name: default-template-library
description: MIT-licensed, repository-only Office template library with retained reference files and previews.

interface.shortDescription: Use retained MIT Office templates from this repository
interface.longDescription: Repository-only MIT Office templates with byte-integrity records. Create a new output from a selected reference; never mutate the retained source file.
defaultPrompt: Create a document from the System Design template
Create a presentation from the Business Review template
Create a workbook from the Sales Pipeline template
